description_long: This is a large, fantasy-inspired sword with a broad, single-edged blade featuring a jagged, aggressive profile and a dark metallic finish. The blade is adorned with vivid green glowing runic patterns, giving it a mystical or magical appearance. The handle is wrapped in a reddish-brown material, likely leather, and ends in a simple, squared pommel. The sword is mounted vertically on a wooden wall, with a pair of green, angular objects—possibly stands or decorative elements—placed nearby. The overall design is robust and intimidating, suggesting it is intended for display or ceremonial use rather than practical combat. The craftsmanship and ornamentation indicate a high level of detail and fantasy aesthetic.
description: A large, jagged fantasy sword with glowing green runes on a dark blade and a wrapped handle, mounted on a wooden wall. The sword is accompanied by green decorative elements at its base.
description_view_0: The sword is seen mounted on a wooden wall, with its glowing green runes and jagged blade edge clearly visible, along with green decorative objects at the base.
description_view_1: The back of the wooden enclosure is visible, with the sword mostly obscured and only a hint of its handle and blade visible from the side.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the plain wooden wall, with the sword and decorative elements completely hidden from sight.
description_view_3: A side angle reveals the edge of the sword and a partial view of the handle, with the green decorative objects barely visible.
attribute_blade_type: single-edged, jagged, fantasy-style blade with runic engravings
attribute_handle_design: straight handle wrapped in reddish-brown material with a squared pommel
attribute_ornamentation: glowing green runic patterns on the blade
